hero.alt: A beautiful portrait of a Firefly in the wild
hero.caption: The Firefly is a highly adapted species with unique behaviors.

habitat.alt: A Firefly navigating its natural environment
habitat.caption: They make their home in diverse habitats where they can find shelter and thrive.

diet.alt: A Firefly finding or consuming food
diet.caption: Finding food is a major part of the daily routine for a Firefly.

baby.alt: A young or baby Firefly showing early development
baby.caption: Baby Fireflys must learn to survive and adapt from a young age.

family.alt: A group of Fireflys interacting with each other
family.caption: While often solitary, some Fireflys interact with others of their species.

range.alt: A Firefly traveling across its geographic range
range.caption: Their geographic range covers various regions suited to their survival.

size.alt: A photo showing the size of a Firefly
size.caption: The size of a Firefly can vary depending on its age and environment.

closeup.alt: A detailed close-up showing the physical features of a Firefly
closeup.caption: A close-up view reveals the intricate details of a Firefly's body.

fun-fact.alt: A Firefly showing a unique behavior or adaptation
fun-fact.caption: Did you know that the Firefly has amazing features that help it survive?
